content.text: How do I write a function that converts a collection of author objects into a clean, comma-separated string while wrapping them in HTML links?
What specific issue arises when this function is called with an empty list of authors?

When no authors are present, the initial check `if not authors:` will evaluate to true because mapping over an empty iterable yields nothing. It gracefully returns an empty string rather than causing an error.
That clears up my final question.
